long_description:
The cosaction delete command should be executed from the deployer, and snapshot labelling should be done from the jumpod.

For this account - aeaedb22e067471bade642c07c030509 there are 10 snapshots which are stuck in deleting.

1. 51196f7b-d620-4453-a68a-ca732d0ea7d0 (mzone 787)  
kubectl delete cosaction -n aeaedb22e067471bade642c07c030509 DELETE51196f7b-d620-4453-a68a-ca732d0ea7d0 
kubectl label snap -n aeaedb22e067471bade642c07c030509 51196f7b-d620-4453-a68a-ca732d0ea7d0 "foo=bar"  

2. 60d582b0-0a70-4422-bb40-be3b00e1957f (mzone787)
